wip-limit.description: The WIP limit of the destination column must not be exceeded.
wip-limit.message: This column is at its WIP limit. Finish or unblock existing work before pulling something new. Click 'Continue Anyway' to override, or cancel to stay focused.

no-pullback.description: Cards must not move backward in the value stream. If rework is needed, add a note to the card explaining why.
no-pullback.message: You're moving a card backward. If rework is needed, add a note to the card explaining why. Click 'Continue Anyway' to proceed, or cancel and add a note first.

entry:review.description: All acceptance criteria must be met from the worker's perspective before a card may enter Review.
entry:review.message: Before moving to Review: have you met all acceptance criteria from your perspective? Click 'Continue Anyway' to confirm and proceed, or cancel to keep working.

entry:done.description: A card may only enter Done after a second person (or the same person after a pause) has verified the outcome.
entry:done.message: Before marking as Done: has the outcome been independently verified? Click 'Continue Anyway' to confirm acceptance, or cancel if verification is still needed.

main-branch.description: Cards should not be implemented on the main or master branch. Check out a feature branch before starting work.
main-branch.message: You are on the 'main' branch. Work on a dedicated feature branch instead. Click 'Continue Anyway' to proceed on main, or cancel and switch branches first.
